positive: A sophisticated, stylized circular mandala design featuring interconnected woodland animals and celestial elements. The main subjects include a majestic stag, a sly fox, a pair of owls, and intertwined constellations of stars and crescent moons. The style should be a highly detailed modern botanical and celestial tattoo flash sheet design, utilizing clean line work, dotwork stippling, and bold linework. The composition must be perfectly centralized and symmetrical, designed to be visually impactful when printed on fabric. Use a limited, earthy color palette of deep forest greens, burnt ochre, midnight blue, and antique gold ink tones. The overall mood is mystical, harmonious, and regal. Ideal for apparel graphic printing, with crisp edges and solid color areas.
